goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 08:45' and should go to 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 08:45 and should go to norwich
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get area and entrance fee
